abn.note: API reachable but ABN_GUID env var not set; returns GUID error without server-side auth

abuseipdb.note: not_connected; needs API key via keychain_secure_connect or ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY

airtable.note: generic action tool only (airtable_action); needs manual test with credentials

algolia.note: not_connected; requires app_id and api_key as mandatory params

alphavantage.note: not_connected; needs API key via keychain_secure_connect or ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY

amazon.note: requires access_key, secret_key, and partner_tag as mandatory params

amber.note: not_connected; needs API key via keychain_secure_connect or AMBER_API_KEY

anthropic.note: api_key is a required param; needs key via keychain or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

asana.note: not_connected; needs personal access token via keychain_secure_connect or ASANA_API_KEY

assemblyai.note: api_key is a required param; needs key via keychain or ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY

australiapost.note: not_connected; needs API key via keychain_secure_connect or AUSPOST_API_KEY

bandsintown.note: 403 forbidden with default app_id; API may have revoked public access

bitbucket.note: requires username, app_password, and workspace as mandatory params

bluesky.note: generic action tool only (bluesky_action); needs manual test with credentials

bgg.note: HTTP 401 on free public API (search and hot endpoints); possibly transient or IP-blocked

brevo.note: api_key is a required param; needs key via keychain or BREVO_API_KEY

bungie.note: not_connected; needs API key via keychain_secure_connect or BUNGIE_API_KEY

csuite.note: AI-powered analysis tool; skipped to avoid LLM cost; needs manual test

calcom.note: api_key is a required param; needs key via keychain or CALCOM_API_KEY

calculator.note: calc_tip returned correct tip calculation (bill=50, 15% tip = 7.50, total 57.50)
